extension.name: AI Boost for Falang Pro
extension.author: AI Boost Team
extension.license: GNU General Public License version 2 or later
extension.description: AI Boost add-on for Falang Pro. Requires AI Boost for Joomla (Basic or Professional) and Falang Pro. Provides: automatic hreflang tags from Falang language data, per-language Schema.org organisation fields, per-language OpenGraph meta, and hreflang alternates in XML sitemap.
